title: Audit diff viewer
description: Side-by-side JSON diff of old_values vs new_values. Restricted fields render as `[REDACTED]` when canViewRestricted=false. Highlights added / changed / removed keys with a colour band on the left.

oldValues.description: old_values JSONB from the Audit row. Null for created events.

newValues.description: new_values JSONB. Null for deleted events.

canViewRestricted.description: Whether to unmask restricted-tier field values.

props.className: font-mono text-xs bg-content2 p-3 rounded border-l-4 border-danger overflow-auto
font-mono text-xs bg-content2 p-3 rounded border-l-4 border-success overflow-auto
